name: agentic-software-operations
description: A platform for agentic software operations: the Atlassian Companion (deterministic Jira + Confluence substrate binding) composed with Product Ops 2.0 (the operating model). Pre-composed distribution — ships the resolved skill set (the Companion's production skills supersede Product Ops 2.0's two substrate reference skills) plus Product Ops 2.0's operating-model layer (reporting cadence, persistence/handoff, retrospective). Headed toward composed platform features: AutoSprint, AutoRetro, Delivery Dashboard, AutoPI Planning.

worksWith.name: atlassian-companion
worksWith.relationship: Composed into this bundle. Standalone, it is the deterministic Jira/Confluence substrate binding.

worksWith.name: product-ops-2
worksWith.relationship: Composed into this bundle. Standalone, it is the operating-model framework.
